mapper.select: SELECT so.*, c.name AS customer_name, p.name AS product_name, p.unit, u.real_name AS salesperson_name FROM sales_order so LEFT JOIN customer c ON so.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN product p ON so.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON so.salesperson_id = u.id WHERE so.status = #{status} ORDER BY so.delivery_date ASC, so.create_time DESC
SELECT so.*, c.name AS customer_name, p.name AS product_name, p.unit FROM sales_order so LEFT JOIN customer c ON so.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN product p ON so.product_id = p.id WHERE so.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_order (order_no, customer_id, product_id, quantity, delivery_date, status, salesperson_id, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{deliveryDate}, #{status}, #{salespersonId}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sales_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
